done: Scaffolded Node.js + TypeScript API and local UI
Implemented script generation endpoint with Azure AI Foundry-compatible chat completion
Implemented Azure Speech Batch synthesis client (create, get, poll)
Implemented SSML builder for multi-talker and fallback two-voice mode
Implemented async episode pipeline with local JSON metadata store
Implemented result ZIP download, extraction, stitching with ffmpeg, and final Blob upload
Added devcontainer with ffmpeg and Azure CLI
Added README with setup and deployment path
Added resilient retry/backoff with jitter for Speech transient failures
Added API authentication middleware with API key and JWT modes
Added CORS allowlist controls and stricter remote media URL safeguards
Added React + Vite + TypeScript frontend in client/ with visual script editor, synthesis progress, audio player, and episode history
Added Bicep IaC (infra/) for policy-safe deployment of AI Foundry (project-based), Speech, Storage, diagnostics, and RBAC
Migrated all Azure auth from API keys/SAS to DefaultAzureCredential (identity-only) via @azure/identity
